subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.25
question_html:
With which do most acids react?

   I. sodium hydrogen carbonate
   II. magnesium
   III. calcium sulfate

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III
examiners_html: This question on reactivity of acids with carbonates and metals (first bullet point in Topic 8.2) confused higher and lower scoring candidates alike and was the worst answered question in paper 1. One teacher commented “The question does not seem clear. They would all react with acids, but what does “most acids” mean?”.
